# F062 Oracle Residual-Cone Capacity

## Decision
`F062_ORACLE_CONE_CAPACITY_EXISTS_ALL_SEEDS`

## Purpose
F061 showed pure floor-direction projection kills delta signal without stabilizing transition. F062 is diagnostic-only: it asks whether any cone between the unprojected residual and the floor-direction-projected residual has held-out safe nonzero capacity after train-only row-wise abstention is fit for each cone.

## Oracle Scope
Held-out oracle selection over cone mix only after train-only row-wise abstention is fit for each cone; diagnostic-only and not promotable.

## Mean Metrics
- oracle nonzero fraction: `1.000000`
- oracle safe fraction: `1.000000`
- oracle cone mix mean: `0.083333`
- oracle effective scale mean: `0.018519`
- oracle transition: `0.466922`
- floor transition: `0.466600`
- oracle delta cosine: `0.887362`
- floor delta cosine: `0.886456`
- oracle recall@1: `0.790123`
- floor recall@1: `0.790123`
- oracle floor gap transition: `0.000323` (min `0.000149`)
- oracle floor gap delta cosine: `0.000906` (min `0.000257`)
- oracle floor gap recall: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`)
- max oracle broken rows: `0`
